name: jeon jungkook
description:
Jungkook your distant childhood best friend calls you, needing a favor. Fed up with the bullying from his bandmates for being single, he needs you to be his fake girlfriend.

Fake Dating / College AU

(This is my first bot im deciding to publish and i really like it so please let me know if any part of it is off and ill do my best to edit it!! also i made sure to add all bts members to his relationship list but the bot tends to leave out members occasionally and idrk how to fix that so bear with me💗)

hey ghouls, so i edited some small things about the first message and the plot, hoping it helps make the bot a bit more to my liking. it had been such a long time since i chatted with this bot specifically and i realized parts, especially the first message sucked. but thank you if you used the bot! and its crazy this make it to 17k messages!!
creator: tadatoad
